data.title: Green Technology Market to Reach USD 102.26 Bn by 2031 Driven by Renewable Energy Adoption and Smart Infrastructure, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of March 31, 2026, a recent study by Mordor Intelligence reveals significant growth in the green technology sector. The report highlights a surge in this market driven by a collective effort from governments and businesses to embrace sustainability and low-carbon solutions. The research indicates a substantial increase in demand for green technology products and services, showcasing a shift towards eco-friendly practices among various sectors. This trend underscores the growing importance of environmental consciousness, with investments in green technology witnessing a surge in recent times.

data.title: MOVA Launches Smart Ring H1 and Smart Glasses S1, Defining a New Wearable AI Ecosystem
data.description: In San Jose, California on March 31, 2026, leading premium brand MOVA revealed its latest wearable technology at a worldwide debut. The company showcased the MOVA Smart Ring H1 and Smart Glasses S1 as part of its growing smart device lineup. This expansion signals a significant move by MOVA into multi-category smart devices, highlighting their commitment to innovation and technological advancement.

data.title: TRON aims for $0.33 breakout from $0.32 with RSI at 69.42. $0.35-$0.40 range possible in 4-6 weeks if momentum sustains.
data.description: At the current rate of $0.32, TRON has an RSI of 69.42, indicating a possible breakout. Analysts predict that if TRON tests the $0.33 resistance, it may lead to a rally pushing it to the $0.35-$0.40 range in the next 4-6 weeks, given that the momentum remains strong.

data.title: SirPAD: Primary Results confirm the safety and efficacy of Sirolimus Coated Balloon in PAD
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on March 31, 2026, Concept Medical Inc. (CMI) disclosed a major breakthrough in drug-delivery technology within vascular interventions. The company unveiled the results from the world's most extensive randomized controlled trial involving a Sirolimus-coated balloon for Peripheral applications.

data.title: World Gym Corporation Partners with Philcos to Launch Branded Merchandise Line
data.description: World Gym Corporation (2762.TW), the company behind the renowned World Gym brand with more than 280 global locations, has disclosed an exclusive licensing agreement that will introduce World Gym Apparel to prominent retailers across North America. This development was made public on March 31, 2026, in Taipei. The agreement is expected to significantly expand the reach of World Gym's apparel line through major retail channels in the region.

Additionally, the cryptocurrency is encountering significant resistance levels as it progresses.

data.title: Democrats are urging CFTC and ethics watchdog on prediction market insider trading as Kalshi and Polymarket plan guardrails to prevent misconduct.
data.description: Two popular prediction markets, Kalshi and Polymarket, are under investigation for suspected insider trading. As a response, they are implementing measures to prevent such incidents. This move comes as the industry continues to grow, with Kalshi boasting over 10,000 active users and Polymarket seeing a surge in trading volume over the past year. The platforms are working to establish safeguards to ensure fair and transparent trading practices in the future.

data.title: Google has revised estimates, stating fewer qubits are needed for cracking crypto than previously thought.
data.description: Google recently revised its estimates regarding the quantum computing resources required to compromise elliptic curve cryptography. The tech giant now predicts that a quantum computer would need to have approximately 20 million physical qubits to successfully break the encryption, a significant increase from the previous estimate of 1 million qubits. This update showcases the rapid advancements in quantum computing technology and highlights the potential challenges faced by current cryptographic systems in the face of these developments.

data.title: NFL calls on prediction markets to address 'easily manipulated' bets; CFTC Chair suggests deferring to league for action on event contracts.
data.description: Chairman Michael Selig of the CFTC stated that the agency is likely to rely on the football league to initiate changes to event contracts that may be altered by just one individual.

data.title: Is a $53M Bitcoin short by a whale on Hyperliquid a cause for concern among traders amidst geopolitical risks and regulatory uncertainty?
data.description: Bearish sentiment is evident in the cryptocurrency market as traders grapple with geopolitical uncertainties, regulatory issues, and macroeconomic data. This is exemplified by a substantial $53 million short position taken on Bitcoin on Hyperliquid, signaling a lack of confidence in the market's upward trajectory. Investors are cautious due to the prevailing global instability and uncertainty surrounding regulations, leading to a significant amount of funds being wagered on the cryptocurrency's decline.
